fields.description: As a QA engineer, I want to fetch a Jira issue and generate a test plan so that I don't have to write it from scratch.
fields.acceptanceCriteria:
1. Must read the Jira ID.
2. Must generate a test plan in Markdown format.
3. Must adhere to the RICE-POT anti-hallucination rules.
4. Output must match the VMO test plan template.
